label: Use Your Name Socially
description: Using a different name with people in your life — friends, family, coworkers, online — is separate from a legal name change and does not require any official steps. It happens on your timeline, with the people you choose.

process.summary: Social name change happens incrementally. Most people start with a trusted person or an online space before widening the circle. Workplace and family situations vary widely — there is no single right approach.

steps.description: Start with the person or space where it feels safest — a close friend, an online community, or an anonymous platform.
Decide how and when to ask others to use your name. Some people send a message; others bring it up in conversation. Either is fine.
Update display names on accounts and platforms where you want your name to be used. Most platforms allow this without any verification.
